basic_details.job_title: IIM Mumbai Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Mumbai (IIM Mumbai)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Mumbai (IIM Mumbai) Consultant (Civil Engineering, Construction Monitoring & Coordination) Notification 2026 has been released on 23-06-2026 on the official website iimmumbai.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Mumbai Consultant (Civil Engineering, Construction Monitoring & Coordination) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in civil engineering (BE/B.Tech Civil) from a recognised University/Institute, Minimum 25 years of experience in Government/PSU/Autonomous Body in planning, design, execution, construction, monitoring and supervision of large civil construction and infrastructure projects at senior supervisory capacity (Superintending Engineer/Chief Engineer or equivalent), Applicant should be a retired Government servant (Central/State Government/PSU/Autonomous Body) who has superannuated from a post not below the level of Superintending Engineer (or equivalent)
qualification.details: Bachelor’s degree in civil engineering (BE/B.Tech Civil) from a recognised University/Institute. Minimum 25 years of experience in Government/PSU/Autonomous Body in planning, design, execution, construction, monitoring and supervision of large civil construction and infrastructure projects at senior supervisory capacity (Superintending Engineer/Chief Engineer or equivalent). Applicant should be a retired Government servant (Central/State Government/PSU/Autonomous Body) who has superannuated from a post not below the level of Superintending Engineer (or equivalent).

selection_process: Application Evaluation by Selection Committee Shortlisting based on qualifications
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIM Mumbai Consultant (Civil Engineering, Construction Monitoring & Coordination) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIM Mumbai Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIM Mumbai Consultant (Civil Engineering, Construction Monitoring & Coordination) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Mumbai Consultant (Civil Engineering, Construction Monitoring & Coordination) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Mumbai Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the IIM Mumbai Consultant (Civil Engineering, Construction Monitoring & Coordination) recruitment is 14th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering (BE/B.Tech Civil) from a recognized University/Institute to be eligible for the Consultant post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum experience required for this position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 25 years of experience in planning, design, execution, construction, monitoring, and supervision of large civil construction and infrastructure projects at a senior supervisory capacity is required.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum age limit for the Consultant post is 62 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 190,000 to Rs. 220,000.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their resume and required documents via email to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an application evaluation by a Selection Committee, shortlisting based on qualifications and experience, and an interaction/interview.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the Indian Institute of Management Mumbai.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIM Mumbai located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Mumbai (IIM Mumbai) is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.
